error.action_required: data.action field is required. Specify Korea Invest API ID (e.g., v1_국내주식-008).
error.api_key_missing: KIS_APP_KEY / KIS_APP_SECRET not configured. Register at Settings > System Modules > korea-invest.
error.unknown_api_id: Unknown API ID: {{action}}. Refer to Korea Invest OPEN API docs.
